prompt: Full-body character design sheet of {character}, {age}, {role}, wearing {costume}, front view and three-quarter view, key props: {props}, expression set: {expressions}, {line style}, {tone}, {era}, white background, consistent manga model sheet.
negative: inconsistent face, extra fingers, unreadable text, modern items, wrong costume

prompt: Manga panel, {shot type}, {character} {action} in {setting}, {era details}, composition: {composition}, lighting: {lighting}, mood: {mood}, style: {line/tone/proportion}, continuity: {costume/props/injuries}.
negative: photorealism, western comic coloring, extra limbs, malformed hands, garbled text
